_comment: Single source of truth for the @bounded-systems knowledge-graph section on the homepage. The section between <!-- registry:start --> / <!-- registry:end --> in index.html is GENERATED by scripts/gen-registry.mjs — do not hand-edit. Canonical labels live in each package package.json bounded.{kind,facet,role,domain}; `--from-bounded` refreshes this seed from them (per-repo), `--reconcile` cross-checks the set. Mirrors the seams pattern.

source.note: each package is its own repo bounded-systems/<name>, except prx-config (in prx)

nodes.name: cas
nodes.tagline: Content-addressable storage substrate: bytes addressed by their SHA-256 digest, with a storage-agnostic blob-store port

nodes.name: machine-schema
nodes.tagline: Brands, handoff envelope, and state/phase/invariant primitives for work-unit machines

nodes.name: audit-context
nodes.tagline: Ambient runtime context for gh-call audit attribution (verb, actor, truth reason)

nodes.name: anchored-chain
nodes.tagline: Derivation chain with contract validation, signing, lineage tracking, and invalidation

nodes.name: anchored-chain-sqlite
nodes.tagline: SQLite/Drizzle-backed implementation of the anchored-chain stores

nodes.name: disposition
nodes.tagline: Pure classifier mapping work-unit surface state to a disposition (ok/prune/repair/review)

nodes.name: prx-config
nodes.tagline: TUI configuration schema parser/emitter for L1 Claude and L2 Warp tools

nodes.name: env
nodes.tagline: The one sanctioned reader of process.env, routing ambient config through capability imports

nodes.name: fs
nodes.tagline: Filesystem capability seam; the one allowed filesystem-access point with an injectable FileSystem

nodes.name: host
nodes.tagline: The one sanctioned reader of host/OS ambient state (home dir, temp dir, hostname), routing ambient authority through capability imports

nodes.name: proc
nodes.tagline: The one allowed subprocess spawn point, routing external-tool invocations through a capability

nodes.name: policy
nodes.tagline: Tool-policy engine enforcing subcommand allowlists by tool, state, and role

nodes.name: verbspec
nodes.tagline: Spec-driven CLI core: author a verb once as a typed VerbSpec, project it to CLI, MCP, OpenAPI, and Anthropic tool surfaces

nodes.name: auth
nodes.tagline: Service-credential resolver (GitHub, Notion) through a single sanctioned access point

nodes.name: gh
nodes.tagline: GitHub CLI wrapper with policy enforcement, rate-limit gating, and budget audit logging

nodes.name: git
nodes.tagline: Git CLI wrapper with policy enforcement and stale-lock recovery

nodes.name: bd
nodes.tagline: Typed interface to the beads CLI with policy enforcement and short-ID guards

nodes.name: github-budget
nodes.tagline: Rate-limit-aware gh wrapper with bucket classification, pre-call gating, and audit trail

nodes.name: scout
nodes.tagline: Content-addressed surface reads (file/grep/files) with anchored-chain provenance

nodes.name: slack
nodes.tagline: Policy-gated, provenance-tracked Slack read surface: bounded read ops behind a swappable transport port, with keymaker-minted scoped credentials

nodes.name: repo-root
nodes.tagline: Repo-root resolution capability: lazy git-based runtime root plus the eager .git-marker walk for build/codegen, the one sanctioned root-resolution point

nodes.name: surface-sync
nodes.tagline: Type ontology for work-unit change-detection across GH/branch/worktree/tmux/beads

nodes.name: schema-gen
nodes.tagline: Project zod schemas to explicit, fast-types-clean TypeScript (zod → JSON Schema → .d.ts)

nodes.name: door-kit
nodes.tagline: In-box door-client SDK for claude-box's capability doors, over the guest-room protocol

nodes.name: guest-room
nodes.tagline: Guest-agnostic room+door capability runtime — the core library claude-box is built on

nodes.name: ocap-provenance
nodes.tagline: Capability-use provenance: a schema + SLSA mapping binding each privileged effect to a signed owner + auditable chain
